Add Task to Section of Project.description: Adds a Task to a Section of a Project.

Create Comment/Story.description: Adds a comment or story to a task.

Create Section.description: Creates a new section within a project.

Create Task.description: Creates a new task in Asana with specified details.

Create Task From Template.description: Creates a new task in Asana from a selected template.

Update Task.description: Updates multiple properties of an existing Asana task.

Find All Tasks From Project.description: Searches for all tasks in a specific project with optional filters.

Find Section in Project.description: Finds an existing section within a workspace project.

Find Task Comments.description: Finds comments for a specific task.

Find Tasks in Workspace.description: Searches for tasks in a workspace using Asana's search API (premium only).

Find User.description: Finds an existing user of your Asana account.
